Prague International Chess Festival 2026 - D

Organizer(s)Novy Bor Chess Club
FederationCzech Republic ( CZE )
Tournament directorLausman, Petr
Chief ArbiterIA Votruba, Pavel 301019
Deputy Chief ArbiterIA Dobrotka, Martin 14900645; IA Huna, Rostislav 397229
ArbiterIA Drahotsky, Lubos 353507; FA Maly, Jiri 23741244
Time control (Standard)2x 1,5 h/40 + 30 min + 30 s/move
LocationDon Giovanni Hotel, Praha
Number of rounds9
Tournament typeSwiss-System
Rating calculationRating national, Rating international
Date2026/02/26 to 2026/03/06
Rating-Ø / Average age2041 / 30
Pairing programSwiss-Manager from Heinz Herzog, Swiss-Manager tournamentfile

Tournament selectionMasters, Challengers, Futures, D open, E1, E2, E3
